title: PDCM Finder + NCI PDMR open-metadata ingest
context: PDCM Finder and NCI PDMR add PDX/organoid breadth, ingesting open metadata only after their terms are verified in the license register (PLAN M1). Depends on the license register (002) and the Cellosaurus+DepMap ingest (007). Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Build a re-runnable PDCM Finder + NCI PDMR open-metadata ingest that normalizes to the schema with provenance and respects per-source ingest flags.
acceptanceCriteria: Re-runnable, idempotent fetch with cached checksums + retrieval dates; ingest only where sources.yaml ingest:true.
Each record provenance-stamped and license-labeled per the license register; identifiers normalized with aliases[].
Only open metadata ingested; no controlled-access fields and no omics payloads re-hosted; reviewed by maintainer + domain reviewer.
output: A merged PR adding the PDCM Finder + NCI PDMR open-metadata ingest normalizing to the schema with provenance.
